description_long: This stool features a distinctive, sculptural form with two thick, rounded white discs forming the top and bottom, sandwiching a central, bulbous section with a mottled gold and black finish. The top and bottom surfaces are slightly irregular, giving a hand-crafted, organic appearance. The central section appears to be made of a different material or is heavily patinated, providing a striking visual contrast. The overall shape is compact and drum-like, with no visible legs or backrest, and the surfaces show subtle textural imperfections and wear. The stool's robust construction suggests it is solid and heavy, suitable for outdoor or public urban environments. Its unique design makes it both functional and decorative, standing out as a statement piece.
description: A compact, drum-shaped stool with white top and bottom discs and a central gold-black mottled section, featuring a hand-crafted, sculptural look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full circular top and bottom with the gold-black central band most visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the transition between the white and gold-black sections, with more of the gold-black band exposed.
description_view_2: The back view reveals mostly the white surfaces, with only a small portion of the gold-black band visible.
description_view_3: This side view displays the gold-black band prominently, with the white discs partially obscured.
